theme: 知名公司与品牌 VI Mockup 展示图

items.title: OpenAI VI 概念 Mockup
items.description: OpenAI 的非官方视觉识别系统延展，以研究感、生成式网格和黑白科技物料构成完整品牌展示。
items.prompt: OpenAI full visual identity system concept mockup, unofficial brand extension, not an exact logo reproduction, 45-degree overhead studio photography, complete stationery, model cards, badges, brand manual, UI screen, black warm-white cyan palette, realistic paper, foil, UV and glass textures, 16:9.

items.title: Anthropic VI 概念 Mockup
items.description: Anthropic 的非官方 VI 延展，用暖灰、人文科技字标、模型安全卡和研究手册呈现可信赖的学术气质。
items.prompt: Anthropic full visual identity system concept mockup, unofficial brand extension, calm research desk, business cards, safety evaluation cards, brand guideline book, tablet dashboard, warm gray black terracotta palette, realistic uncoated paper, debossing and fabric textures, 16:9.

items.title: Google DeepMind VI 概念 Mockup

items.prompt: Google DeepMind full visual identity system concept mockup, unofficial brand extension, laboratory tabletop, research reports, model evaluation cards, colorful data nodes, molecule visualization, brand guideline manual, acrylic and paper materials, bright clean photography, 16:9.

items.title: Midjourney VI 概念 Mockup
